calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Empire Court Apartments is present, represented by Rene Ortiz.
Attorney Mark Chernev for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kael Alaimo is present.
Attorney Thomas Lavander appearing for defendant in limited scope.

Settlement discussions held with a Judge Pro Tem Dawn Payne. This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of Mar-17-2025 is vacated.
